sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10856" key="a)nuperqete/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνυπερθε-τέω</orth>, <sense id="n10856.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">do immediately, to be hasty,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">77(78).21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
